name: Aman Gupta
title: Co-founder & CMO, boAt
bio: Aman Gupta is the co-founder and Chief Marketing Officer of boAt, India's leading consumer electronics brand. Before boAt, he worked at KPMG and Citibank. He's known for his marketing acumen and aggressive deal-making style on Shark Tank India.

name: Ashneer Grover
title: Co-founder & MD, BharatPe
bio: Ashneer Grover co-founded BharatPe, a fintech company revolutionizing payments for small merchants. IIT Delhi and IIM Ahmedabad alumnus. Known for his bold, sometimes abrasive opinions and sharp business analysis.

name: Namita Thapar
title: Executive Director, Emcure Pharmaceuticals
bio: Namita Thapar is the Executive Director of Emcure Pharmaceuticals, one of India's largest pharma companies. She champions women entrepreneurs and healthcare startups. Duke University MBA alumna.

name: Anupam Mittal
title: Founder & CEO, Shaadi.com
bio: Anupam Mittal is the founder and CEO of Shaadi.com, India's pioneer matrimony platform. He's also an active angel investor with 200+ investments. Boston College MBA alumnus.

name: Vineeta Singh
title: CEO & Co-founder, SUGAR Cosmetics
bio: Vineeta Singh is the CEO and co-founder of SUGAR Cosmetics, a leading D2C beauty brand. IIT Madras and IIM Ahmedabad alumna. She turned down a ₹1 Cr salary offer to pursue entrepreneurship.

name: Peyush Bansal
title: CEO & Co-founder, Lenskart
bio: Peyush Bansal is the co-founder and CEO of Lenskart, revolutionizing eyewear retail in India with omnichannel presence. IIT Delhi alumnus. Known for meticulous due diligence and long-term thinking.

name: Ghazal Alagh
title: Co-founder & Chief Innovation Officer, Mamaearth
bio: Ghazal Alagh co-founded Mamaearth, India's first MADE SAFE certified baby care brand. The company went public in 2023 with a ₹10,000+ Cr valuation. She focuses on purpose-driven brands.

name: Amit Jain
title: CEO & Co-founder, CarDekho
bio: Amit Jain is the CEO and co-founder of CarDekho Group, a leading auto-tech marketplace in India. IIT Delhi alumnus. The company is a unicorn valued at $1.2 billion.
